title: Incorrectly Implemented Dynamic Array Stack with Miscounted Elements

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.notes: Size of array must not exceed 10000, elements are unique integers in [-1,000,000, 1,000,000]

hints.text: In the given implementation, the pop operation is causing issues.

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.betterSolution: Optimize by using a fixed-size array for stack
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a linked list instead of an array for stack implementation
